blocks.text: Cash paid for income taxes amounted to $77.6 million, $25.9 million and $48.4 million during fiscal 2019, 2018 and 2017,
respectively. Cash paid for interest on borrowings amounted to $347.9 million, $85.3 million and $82.5 million during fiscal 2019, 2018 and 2017, respectively.

On October 28, 2002, the Company announced that its Board of Directors had approved and instituted a quarterly cash

dividend on its common stock. The Company has continued to pay quarterly dividends and has increased the amount of such dividends on a regular basis. Cash dividends paid per share were $1.457, $1.449 and $1.441 during fiscal 2019, 2018 and 2017, respectively. Total dividend payments amounted to $344.4 million, $337.5 million and $315.4 million during fiscal 2019, 2018 and 2017, respectively.
